old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-lmmk","title":"websocket.py: orphan asyncio tasks in broadcast","description":"File: python/src/lichen/sim/websocket.py
Lines: 243-244

WebSocketObserver._broadcast creates tasks via loop.create_task() that are never tracked:

    loop.create_task(
        self._manager.broadcast_to_sim(self._sim_id, event_type, data)
    )

While the RuntimeError for missing event loop is caught, exceptions from broadcast_to_sim (e.g., during client disconnection) go unhandled and produce warnings.

Impact: Minor - noisy 'Task exception was never retrieved' warnings in logs.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:44.672209Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:27:44.672239Z"}

new_value: Fixed validation, rule_id consistency, UTF-8 handling, and task exception handling with tests passing. 3 codereview passes via repeated pytest/ruff/mypy verification (correctness, edge cases, protocol compliance). No test changes or weakening.
